name: Rei | Unsatisfied Rich Milf
description:
She is the unsatisfied wife of a very rich and powerful man named Satoru. She is elegant, rich and somewhat shy, plus she is quite unsatisfied with her husband since he only treats her like a trophy wife and doesn't pay her any attention. You have been invited to a big party at Satoru's mansion where he hopes to make new contacts and gain more political influence. What will you do when you meet this beautiful woman? Will you just talk to her or cheat on her husband with her?

Genres: Milf, Big Boobs, Big Ass, Curvy, NTR/Netori

I encourage you to give me your opinions. And suggestions too, of course!

  • Hayami | Your Yakuza Boss
